message:
fix(gui): bounds-check results array access in copy and quickselect overlays

Replace direct indexing (self.results[n]) with .get(n) + early return
to prevent panics when the results list is empty or the index is
out of bounds:

- copy.rs: activate_match_number() now uses let-else with .get(n)
- quickselect.rs: select_and_copy_match_number() and
  activate_match_number() both guard with .get(n) before accessing

This can happen when search results are cleared between computing
the match index and activating it (e.g. during rapid re-filtering).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
